creator: michael@lyngbol.dk
text:
On 22.09.2001 14:26:54 +0000, Michael Lyngbøl wrote:

> >How-To-Repeat:
> >Fix:
> 
> # This is a shell archive.  Save it in a file, remove anything before
> # this line, and then unpack it by entering "sh file".  Note, it may
> # create directories; files and directories will be owned by you and
> # have default permissions.
> #
> # This archive contains:
> #
> #	p5-Parse-Yapp/
> #	p5-Parse-Yapp/Makefile
> #	p5-Parse-Yapp/distinfo
> #	p5-Parse-Yapp/pkg-plist
> #	p5-Parse-Yapp/pkg-comment
> #	p5-Parse-Yapp/pkg-descr
> #
> echo c - p5-Parse-Yapp/
> mkdir -p p5-Parse-Yapp/ > /dev/null 2>&1
> echo x - p5-Parse-Yapp/Makefile
> sed 's/^X//' >p5-Parse-Yapp/Makefile << 'END-of-p5-Parse-Yapp/Makefile'
> X# New ports collection makefile for:	p5-Parse-Yapp
> X# Date created:			August 16 2001

Wrong date, fix:

--- Makefile.orig	Sat Sep 22 14:49:27 2001
+++ Makefile	Sat Sep 22 14:50:04 2001
@@ -1,5 +1,5 @@
 # New ports collection makefile for:	p5-Parse-Yapp
-# Date created:			August 16 2001
+# Date created:		 	22 September 2001	
 # Whom:	      			Michael Lyngbøl <lyngbol@wheel.dk>
 #
 # $FreeBSD$
